heading: International agreements excluded from provisions of chapter
label: 1511 International agreements excluded from provisions of chapter
text: This chapter does not apply to treaties, conventions, protocols, and other international agreements, or proclamations thereof by the President.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 312 (, ).July 26, 1935, ch. 417, § 1249 Stat. 503
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 312 (, ).July 26, 1935, ch. 417, § 1249 Stat. 503
